title: Crispy Peruvian Octopus Stir-fry
description: A savory and crowd-pleasing paleo-friendly dish that combines crispy octopus with a blend of sea salts for an elevated seafood experience.

ingredients.name: Octopus
ingredients.amount: 1 (400g) whole octopus, cleaned and thinly sliced

ingredients.name: Paleo-friendly Coconut Oil or Avocado Oil

instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (205°C). Pat the octopus slices dry with paper towels.
Mix sea salt and savory blend seasoning in a bowl. Apply evenly over all sides of each slice using tongs or a spoon, ensuring they're well coated.
Arrange the seasoned octopus slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 10 minutes.
After 10 minutes, reduce heat to broil and continue broiling until the edges are crisp and golden brown (about 5-7 more minutes). Rotate the tray halfway during cooking.
While the octopus crisps up in the oven, prepare a quick sauce by combining 2 tablespoons of the remaining oil with 1 teaspoon lemon juice. Drizzle over the cooked octopus.
Season with additional sea salt to taste and serve hot as a main course.
